name: kaoyan-focus
description: Windows local-first study focus app for exam preparation, built with Tauri, React, TypeScript and Rust.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:download-cleanup && npm run test:clipboard-cleanup && npm run test:system-diagnostic && npm run build && npm run check:rust
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run check:rust && npm run test:download-cleanup && npm run test:clipboard-cleanup && npm run test:system-diagnostic
scripts.format: prettier --write README.md FEATURES.md CHANGELOG.md SECURITY.md SUPPORT.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md NOTICE.md docs/assets/README.md package.json .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/dependabot.yml .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md .github/pull_request_template.md
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md FEATURES.md CHANGELOG.md SECURITY.md SUPPORT.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md NOTICE.md docs/assets/README.md package.json .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/dependabot.yml .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md .github/pull_request_template.md
